    Outline

    Draws a sharp outline following the shape of a label, image, or vector graphic. Multiple outlines can be chained, each with its own width, color, and alignment mode.

    Parameters

    Parameter Description
    width Outline thickness
    color Outline color
    mode Alignment relative to the source edge

    Alignment modes

    • 0: Outside
    • 1: Center
    • 2: Inside
    • Edit this page
